postReview.title: Portugal 0-0 France (aet, 3-5 on penalties): Ronaldo's final Euros comes to a close as Joao Felix misses from the spot
postReview.description: Joao Felix missed from 12 yards as France claimed a 5-3 shootout win over Portugal to progress into the semi-finals at Euro 2024.

QAData.question: Who won between Portugal and France on Fri, 05 Jul 2024 19:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: France won 0–0 (5–3) over Portugal after penalties on Fri, 05 Jul 2024 19:00:00 GMT.
